MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. COREY MILLER, ESQ. of Miller Miller Menthe LLP (Tel: 714-450-3800) appearing telephonically via CourtCall for defendant EAN Holdings, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Matter is submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant EAN Holdings, LLC's demurrer to both causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Naji Jackson is sustained without leave to amend as to both causes of action. No opposition filed.
